quests.title: Gym Visit
quests.description: Go to the gym or complete a structured 30 minutes workout session

quests.title: Back Guardian
quests.description: Do 10 minutes of posture or back exercises

quests.title: Training Flow
quests.description: Complete 30 minutes of training with no skipped blocks

quests.title: Forge Session
quests.description: Complete 1 hour of a sport session or workout

quests.title: Outdoor Pulse
quests.description: Do 25 minutes of active movement outdoors

quests.title: Active Day
quests.description: Avoid sitting longer than 90 minutes at a time all day

quests.title: Deep Focus
quests.description: Read or study with focus for 30 minutes

quests.title: Rune of Notes
quests.description: Write notes from something you learned today

quests.title: Signal Over Noise
quests.description: Learn something for 25 minutes without switching focus

quests.title: Clarity Draft
quests.description: Write 150+ words of useful thinking or reflection

quests.title: Sharp Edge
quests.description: Do 20 minutes of logic, math, or analytical practice

quests.title: Strategy Hour
quests.description: Spend 30 minutes on planning or strategic thinking

quests.title: Sacred Hour
quests.description: Keep your first hour after waking free from phones and screens

quests.title: House of Order
quests.description: Organize one shelf, drawer, or small zone

quests.title: Food Discipline
quests.description: Avoid junk food and eat only healthy meals

quests.title: Evening Reset
quests.description: Prepare tomorrow’s clothes, tools, or workspace

quests.title: Silent Mind
quests.description: Spend 10 minutes in silence without content, only being present

quests.title: Peacekeeper
quests.description: Take 30 minutes of calm rest without digital stimulation

quests.title: Grounded Spirit
quests.description: Take a 30-minute walk without using your phone

quests.title: Nocturnal Discipline
quests.description: Avoid screens for 30 minutes before sleep

quests.title: Healing Hour
quests.description: Spend one full hour in low-stimulation recovery

quests.title: Social Link
quests.description: Call or voice-message a friend or family member

quests.title: Kind Spark
quests.description: Offer sincere support or encouragement to someone

quests.title: Guild Message
quests.description: Reach out first to someone you have not talked to recently

quests.title: Ally’s Aid
quests.description: Help someone with advice or a practical action

quests.title: Circle of Trust
quests.description: Spend 20+ minutes in meaningful live conversation

quests.title: Beacon
quests.description: Do a helpful act without expecting anything back

quests.title: Hydration Rite
quests.description: Drink your full water target today

quests.title: Dawn Start
quests.description: Wake up on time and begin the day without snoozing

quests.title: Morning Momentum
quests.description: Take a cold shower in the morning

quests.title: Clean Fuel
quests.description: Eat 3 intentional meals without impulsive snacking

quests.title: Scholar’s Vigil
quests.description: Complete 60 minutes of study with phone away and notes taken

quests.title: Learn 10 New Words
quests.description: Learn and review 10 new foreign language words

quests.title: Listen in Target Language
quests.description: Listen to 15 minutes of content in a foreign language

quests.title: Speak Practice
quests.description: Speak for 10 minutes in a foreign language (self-talk or partner)

quests.title: Read 15 Minutes
quests.description: Read for at least 15 minutes in a foreign language

quests.title: Deep Work Session
quests.description: Focus on one task for 25 minutes without distractions

quests.title: Cold Shower
quests.description: Take a cold shower for at least 1 minute

quests.title: Reach Out
quests.description: Send a meaningful message to someone

quests.title: No Junk Food
quests.description: Do not eat junk food (pizza, burgers, chips, or other unhealthy foods)
